meta.name: MYCODELAB
meta.description: A curated repository of numerical methods, computational physics implementations, and scientific tools — built by MSc Physics students for the broader research community.

contributors.name: Abhineet Srivastava
contributors.bio: MSc Physics candidate with research interests in computational methods, numerical analysis, and scientific computing. Focuses on robust algorithm implementation and mathematical rigour.

contributors.name: Agnik Senroy
contributors.bio: MSc Physics candidate specialising in signal processing, spectral analysis, and numerical simulation. Contributor to Fourier methods, data analysis, and differentiation modules.

categories.name: Root Finding
categories.description: Bracketing and iterative methods for locating zeros of nonlinear equations.

projects.title: Bisection Method
projects.author: abhineet
projects.description: Guaranteed-convergence bracketing method for isolating roots of continuous functions. Implements adaptive step-halving with configurable tolerance and iteration bounds.

projects.title: Newton-Raphson Method
projects.author: abhineet
projects.description: Quadratically convergent iterative root-finding using function value and first derivative. Includes convergence basin analysis and fractal boundary visualisation.

projects.title: Secant & Regula Falsi
projects.author: agnik
projects.description: Derivative-free secant method and false position (regula falsi) with superlinear convergence. Comparison benchmarks against Newton-Raphson.
projects.output: Secant: 6 iters vs Newton: 5 iters (similar accuracy)

categories.name: Numerical Integration
categories.description: Quadrature rules and stochastic methods for definite integral approximation.

projects.title: Simpson's Rule
projects.author: abhineet
projects.description: Composite Simpson's 1/3 and 3/8 rules with error estimation via Richardson extrapolation.

projects.title: Gaussian Quadrature
projects.author: abhineet
projects.description: Gauss-Legendre nodes and weights up to order 20. Near-machine-precision on smooth functions with far fewer evaluations than Newton-Cotes rules.
projects.output: ∫₋₁¹ eˣ dx ≈ 2.35040  (n=5 pts, exact to 15 d.p.)

projects.title: Monte Carlo Integration
projects.author: agnik
projects.description: Stochastic integration in 1D, 2D, and 3D domains using importance sampling and variance reduction.

categories.name: Linear Algebra
categories.description: Direct and iterative solvers, eigenvalue methods, and matrix factorisations.

projects.title: LU Decomposition
projects.author: abhineet
projects.description: Partial-pivot LU factorisation for solving Ax=b. Includes determinant calculation and matrix inversion.

projects.title: Gauss-Seidel Iteration
projects.author: agnik
projects.description: Iterative solver for diagonally-dominant linear systems with convergence monitoring.

projects.title: Power Iteration & Eigenvalues
projects.author: abhineet
projects.description: Power iteration, inverse iteration, and QR algorithm for eigenvalue problems of physics Hamiltonians.

categories.name: Ordinary Differential Equations
categories.description: Initial and boundary value problem solvers for first- and higher-order ODE systems.

projects.title: Runge-Kutta 4th Order
projects.author: abhineet
projects.description: Classic RK4 integrator for systems of first-order ODEs. Applied to pendulum, Lotka-Volterra, and SIR models.

projects.title: Euler & Improved Euler
projects.author: agnik
projects.description: Forward Euler, backward Euler, and Heun's method with step-size convergence analysis.
projects.output: Global error O(h) for Euler, O(h²) for Heun (verified)

projects.title: Shooting Method — BVP
projects.author: abhineet
projects.description: Converts boundary value problems to IVP using Newton shooting. Solves QHO and buckling beam.
projects.output: Eigenvalues Eₙ = ℏω(n+½) confirmed for n=0..4

categories.name: Fourier Methods
categories.description: Discrete and fast Fourier transforms, spectral analysis, and convolution.

projects.title: FFT Signal Analysis
projects.author: agnik
projects.description: Fast Fourier Transform for spectral analysis of time-series data with windowing functions.

projects.title: DFT Convolution & Filters
projects.author: agnik
projects.description: Convolution theorem for digital filtering. Low-pass, high-pass, and Gaussian smoothing kernels.

categories.name: Data Analysis
categories.description: Curve fitting, statistical methods, and data reduction for experimental physics.

projects.title: Least Squares Curve Fitting
projects.author: agnik
projects.description: Linear and nonlinear least-squares fitting with uncertainty propagation and residual analysis.

projects.title: Chi-Squared Goodness of Fit
projects.author: agnik
projects.description: χ² test for goodness-of-fit and parameter estimation with confidence intervals.
projects.output: χ²_min found; 1σ contours plotted for 2-parameter fit

categories.name: Numerical Simulations
categories.description: Full physics simulations including N-body dynamics and PDE solvers.

projects.title: N-Body Gravitational Simulation
projects.author: agnik
projects.description: Direct N-body gravitational simulation with velocity Verlet integration and energy conservation monitoring.

projects.title: Heat Equation — FD Solver
projects.author: abhineet
projects.description: Explicit and implicit finite difference for 1D heat equation with stability analysis (CFL condition).
projects.output: Stable for r = αΔt/Δx² ≤ 0.5 (explicit scheme verified)

categories.name: Numerical Differentiation
categories.description: Finite difference approximations for derivatives with Richardson extrapolation.

projects.title: Finite Difference Derivatives
projects.author: agnik
projects.description: Forward, backward, and central difference formulas of orders 2, 4, and 6 with error analysis.
projects.output: 6th-order central diff error: O(h⁶) confirmed numerically

categories.name: Systems of Linear Equations
categories.description: Direct and iterative methods for large linear systems arising in physics problems.

projects.title: Gaussian Elimination
projects.author: abhineet
projects.description: Row-reduction with partial pivoting and back substitution. Includes condition number estimation.

projects.title: Conjugate Gradient Solver
projects.author: abhineet
projects.description: Iterative CG solver for large sparse SPD systems. Applied to FEM discretisations of Poisson equation.
